# Legion API Contracts

The API contracts describe provider-neutral command and query envelopes for Legion workflow hosts. They do not encode HTTP methods, paths, status codes, sockets, runtime sessions, model providers, or storage provider details.

## Commands

Commands request workflow state transitions. Every state-changing command has a cataloged success result type and a cataloged typed rejection result. Command handlers should emit durable events only after accepting a command.

| Command type | State-changing | Success result | Rejection result | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `project.init.v1` | yes | `project.init.accepted.v1` | `project.init.rejected.v1` | Initialize a project workflow root. |
| `baseline.refresh.v1` | yes | `baseline.refresh.accepted.v1` | `baseline.refresh.rejected.v1` | Record a refreshed project baseline. |
| `change.create.v1` | yes | `change.create.accepted.v1` | `change.create.rejected.v1` | Create a workflow change. |
| `change.specify.v1` | yes | `change.specify.accepted.v1` | `change.specify.rejected.v1` | Attach specification artifacts to a change. |
| `change.oracle.v1` | yes | `change.oracle.accepted.v1` | `change.oracle.rejected.v1` | Attach oracle artifacts to a change. |
| `change.design.v1` | yes | `change.design.accepted.v1` | `change.design.rejected.v1` | Attach design artifacts to a change. |
| `change.plan.v1` | yes | `change.plan.accepted.v1` | `change.plan.rejected.v1` | Attach task planning artifacts to a change. |
| `change.revise.v1` | yes | `change.revise.accepted.v1` | `change.revise.rejected.v1` | Revise a change after feedback. |
| `task.create.v1` | yes | `task.create.accepted.v1` | `task.create.rejected.v1` | Create an operational task from a task contract. |
| `task.claim.v1` | yes | `task.claim.accepted.v1` | `task.claim.rejected.v1` | Claim a task for a worker run. |
| `task.block.v1` | yes | `task.block.accepted.v1` | `task.block.rejected.v1` | Record a task blocker. |
| `task.complete.v1` | yes | `task.complete.accepted.v1` | `task.complete.rejected.v1` | Record task completion. |
| `task.invalidate.v1` | yes | `task.invalidate.accepted.v1` | `task.invalidate.rejected.v1` | Invalidate a stale task. |
| `run.start.v1` | yes | `run.start.accepted.v1` | `run.start.rejected.v1` | Start a task run. |
| `approval.request.v1` | yes | `approval.request.accepted.v1` | `approval.request.rejected.v1` | Request approval for an effect. |
| `approval.decide.v1` | yes | `approval.decide.accepted.v1` | `approval.decide.rejected.v1` | Record an approval decision. |
| `review.submit.v1` | yes | `review.submit.accepted.v1` | `review.submit.rejected.v1` | Submit review findings. |
| `release.request.v1` | yes | `release.request.accepted.v1` | `release.request.rejected.v1` | Request a release. |
| `observation.record.v1` | yes | `observation.record.accepted.v1` | `observation.record.rejected.v1` | Record release observation data. |
| `archive.create.v1` | yes | `archive.create.accepted.v1` | `archive.create.rejected.v1` | Archive completed workflow evidence. |
| `worker.create.v1` | yes | `worker.create.accepted.v1` | `worker.create.rejected.v1` | Register a worker bundle extension. |
| `council.request.v1` | yes | `council.request.accepted.v1` | `council.request.rejected.v1` | Request governance council deliberation. |
| `doctor.run.v1` | no | `doctor.run.accepted.v1` | `doctor.run.rejected.v1` | Run protocol and state diagnostics without mutating workflow state. |

## Queries

Queries return typed projections with cursor pagination. The cursor is an opaque protocol value; transport adapters may map it to host-specific request syntax outside this package.
